pageContext.name: Sora Ver. 2 (Deluxe Version)
pageContext.description: Sora, the main protagonist of KINGDOM HEARTS III, makes an appearance in the PLAY ARTS KAI line with a completely new 'Ver.2 sculpt!   In addition to the brushed-up modeling, he features the metallic crown motif necklace, which is eye-catching. The face parts are vividly colored and have detailed expressions. Includes alternate hand parts and Sora's iconic Kingdom Key Keyblade. Additionally, the Deluxe version comes with two extra face parts, one with a smiling face and the other with a battle face, as well as the Shooting Star and Ultima Weapon Keyblades, making this a luxurious set. This is a must-have item for fans who want to reenact various scenes from the game
